specialists.name: Andrezza
specialists.title: Specialist in Eyelash Extensions, Lift & Tint, and Eyebrows.
specialists.description: Andreza is our resident Lash Expert, specializing in 100% bespoke, custom eyelash extensions that are perfectly tailored to your unique eye shape. Driven by a passion for advanced beauty and client care, Andreza is currently continuing her education to become a Registered Nurse (RN), with the goal of expanding her expertise to offer cutting-edge medical aesthetics in the future.
specialists.imageAlt: Portrait of NJ, founder and master injector

specialists.name: Erica Shea
specialists.title: Permanent Makeup Expert
specialists.description: Erica is a master of permanent artistry, and paramedical micropigmentation. She blends meticulous bespoke mapping to deliver sophisticated, natural-looking results. As the founder of her own PMU Academy, Erica is dedicated to elevating industry standards through both elite clinical practice and professional mentorship.

specialists.name: Kelsey
specialists.title: Hairdresser and blonding specialist
specialists.description: Kelsey is a qualified hairdresser and blonding specialist, as well as a certified Head Spa expert. She focuses on scalp health as the foundation for beautiful hair, delivering customized treatments that cleanse, hydrate, and restore-while providing a deeply relaxing experience.
specialists.imageAlt: Portrait of Kelsey, head spa specialist

specialists.name: Carolina
specialists.title: Medical Esthetician
specialists.description: Carolina is a highly skilled medical esthetician with over a decade of experience in advanced skin and aesthetic treatments. Specializing in laser, electrology, and results-driven skin therapies, she combines clinical expertise with a personalized approach to deliver safe, effective, and natural-looking results. With a strong background in biomedical science, Carolina focuses on enhancing skin health from within-helping clients achieve long-term confidence through tailored, high-performance treatments.
